'''''Ultimate Missions: Revenge of the Sith''''' is a book based on the characters of the [[Star Wars Miniatures]]: ''[[Revenge of the Sith (Star Wars Miniatures)|Revenge of the Sith]]'' set. The book was released [[May]], [[2005]] by [[Wizards of the Coast]] as a paperback.

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''Third in a series of titles that accompany each Star Wars miniatures expansion, Ultimate Missions: Revenge of the Sith provides extended information and gameplay suggestions for anyone looking to maximize their Star Wars Miniatures experience. In addition to game-related content, this full-color product also contains a foldout poster map and new color terrain tiles to diversify gameplay.''
